title: Stop Text column from auto-linking email address?
excerpt: I have a Text column that we use to house email address that we can access to copy/paste into an update when we need to communicate with non-account holders. But, the Text column automatically creates a link to our Outlo…

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a Text column that we use to house email address that we can access to copy/paste into an update when we need to communicate with non-account holders. But, the Text column automatically creates a link to our Outlook, which does not Cc to the pulse.

How can I undo this “auto-link email” function?
